update:
Expanded plant coverage in Japan 
 The Pollen API now includes information about the Japanese cypress and Japanese cedar tree species. For more information, see  Country and region coverage .

Pollen API 
 Announcing the General Availability (GA) release of the Pollen API. See the  Release Notes  for information about this release and for all other releases. 
 If you are a new user, see  Set Up in the Google Cloud Console  to start the installation process.
